_comment: Curated full original-language biblical text (Hebrew / Greek / Aramaic) for the week's readings. This file is the source of truth for the 'Show Original Languages' feature. Edit this instead of putting long strings inside index.html. The app loads it at runtime and merges it with any inline data in STUDY_CONFIG.
_format: Keys are week IDs (as strings). Each value is an array of objects with ref, language, text (the actual script), translit, and meaning.

1.text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
1.translit: Bereshit bara Elohim et hashamayim ve'et ha'aretz
1.meaning: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

1.text: וַיַּ֤רְא אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה וְהִנֵּה־ט֖וֹב מְאֹ֑ד וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם הַשִּׁשִּֽׁי׃
1.translit: Vayar Elohim et kol asher asah vehineh tov me'od
1.meaning: God saw all that He had made, and behold, it was very good.

22.text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
22.translit: Bereshit bara Elohim et hashamayim ve'et ha'aretz
22.meaning: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

22.text: וַיַּ֤רְא אֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה וְהִנֵּה־ט֖וֹב מְאֹ֑ד וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם הַשִּׁשִּֽׁי׃
22.translit: Vayar Elohim et kol asher asah vehineh tov me'od
22.meaning: God saw all that He had made, and behold, it was very good.
